title: andropogon kelleri
intro: Andropogon kelleri, also known as East Indian thistle, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Its health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties, which make it effective in reducing pain and inflammation, and treating infections. Herbal preparations of Andropogon kelleri can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health symptoms.
